notes: This workspace includes a local VS Code extension at .vscode/extension/.
Run the 'Install Drekker Extension' task once to create a junction from ~/.vscode/extensions/ into this folder.
After running the task, reload VS Code (Ctrl+Shift+P → Developer: Reload Window).
Changes to the extension source are reflected immediately — no reinstall needed.
To iterate on the extension in isolation, use the 'Run Drekker Extension (Dev)' launch config (F5).
